name: hospital-queue-system
description: Hospital Queue Management System - Full Stack Application

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.prestart:concurrent: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = @(5000, 3001); foreach ($port in $ports) { $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($connections) { $pids = $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($procId in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ('Freed port ' + $port + ' by stopping PID ' + $procId); } } else { Write-Host ('Port ' + $port + ' is free'); } }"
scripts.client:start: cd client && set PORT=3001 && npm start

author: Meenachi Sundaresan
